d:
Nontrinsic is an open archive dedicated to preserving nonsense. Browse the archive and contribute your own entries—whether structured or unstructured, intentional or purely accidental. Features
  • Browse the Nontrinsic archive
  • Write and submit entries
  • Persistent drafts (saved automatically until submitted)
  • Full offline access after initial loading
  • View text entries with images, video, and audio
  • Connect to another Nontrinsic instance
  • Material You theming (Android 12+)
  • Switch between galaxy and classic cluster app icons
  • No tracking or analytics
  • Supports Android 5+
